_provenance: A synthetic end-to-end guard trace authored for the gateway harness (guard_trace_e2e_test.go) and the `fak guard --replay-trace` operator surface. Each turn is one upstream model response carrying tool_use/tool_calls blocks AND a usage block; `class` is the verdict the guard floor MUST reach for that call. The fake upstream replays these turn-by-turn so the REAL proxy planner + gateway adjudication + decision journal + token economy run end-to-end with no API key and no GPU. Token numbers model a realistic cache economy: a cold first turn that writes cache, then turns that read it back.

turns.note: Cold first turn: the agent reads a file and runs a benign command. Both allowed. Cache is being WRITTEN (cache_creation), no read yet -> the per-turn verdict is cold/warming, saved is not yet positive.
The floor FIRES on destructive operations, but allows writes to .ssh/ (issue #1086: remote dev-node SSH requires this). The danger calls are DENYed (POLICY_BLOCK); the Write survives.
Recovery turn: the agent adapts and proposes only benign work. All allowed. Continued cache reads keep the saving positive.
